retrieved_result: Calculate Gross Pay Based on Net Pay Home > Payroll > Gross-up Calculate Gross Pay Based on Net Pay Use this calculator to gross up wages based on net pay. For example if an employee receives $100 in taxable benefits or cash, this calculator can be used to calculate the gross amount that must be used when calculating payroll taxes. Of
